languages.original_text: "You are the quintessence of the will of the Imperium. Your purpose in life is to expand it and strengthen its power where other subjects cannot reach. You do not explore the frontier. You are the frontier."

languages.text: "Вы — квинтэссенция воли Империума. Ваш смысл — расширять его и укреплять его мощь там, куда не могут дотянуться прочие подданые. Вы не исследуете фронтир. Вы и есть фронтир".

"You are the quintessence of the will of the Imperium. Your purpose in life is to expand it and strengthen its power where other subjects cannot reach. You do not explore the frontier. You are the frontier."
languages.original_text: "Вы — квинтэссенция воли Империума. Ваш смысл — расширять его и укреплять его мощь там, куда не могут дотянуться прочие подданые. Вы не исследуете фронтир. Вы и есть фронтир".

traits.locale_text: "You are the quintessence of the will of the Imperium. Your purpose in life is to expand it and strengthen its power where other subjects cannot reach. You do not explore the frontier. You are the frontier."

"You are the quintessence of the will of the Imperium. Your purpose in life is to expand it and strengthen its power where other subjects cannot reach. You do not explore the frontier. You are the frontier."

"You are the quintessence of the will of the Imperium. Your purpose in life is to expand it and strengthen its power where other subjects cannot reach. You do not explore the frontier. You are the frontier."

languages.text: «Es la personificación de la voluntad del Imperium. Su propósito en la vida es expandirlo y reforzar su poder allá donde otros súbditos no pueden llegar. Usted es la frontera».
languages.original_text: "You are the quintessence of the will of the Imperium. Your purpose in life is to expand it and strengthen its power where other subjects cannot reach. You do not explore the frontier. You are the frontier."

traits.locale_text: «Es la personificación de la voluntad del Imperium. Su propósito en la vida es expandirlo y reforzar su poder allá donde otros súbditos no pueden llegar. Usted es la frontera».

languages.text: “您是帝国意志的化身。您生命的意义就是奔赴其他臣民无法触及之处，开疆拓土，巩固帝国之威。您不是在探索边疆，您本身就是边疆。”
languages.original_text: "You are the quintessence of the will of the Imperium. Your purpose in life is to expand it and strengthen its power where other subjects cannot reach. You do not explore the frontier. You are the frontier."

traits.locale_text: “您是帝国意志的化身。您生命的意义就是奔赴其他臣民无法触及之处，开疆拓土，巩固帝国之威。您不是在探索边疆，您本身就是边疆。”

languages.text: « Vous êtes la quintessence de la volonté de l'Imperium. Votre fonction est d'accroître la portée de son contrôle et de renforcer son pouvoir dans des lieux que ses autres sujets ne peuvent espérer atteindre. Vous n'explorez pas ses frontières ; vous les définissez. »
languages.original_text: "You are the quintessence of the will of the Imperium. Your purpose in life is to expand it and strengthen its power where other subjects cannot reach. You do not explore the frontier. You are the frontier."

traits.locale_text: « Vous êtes la quintessence de la volonté de l'Imperium. Votre fonction est d'accroître la portée de son contrôle et de renforcer son pouvoir dans des lieux que ses autres sujets ne peuvent espérer atteindre. Vous n'explorez pas ses frontières ; vous les définissez. »

languages.text: "Ihr seid die Quintessenz des Willens des Imperiums. Eure Lebensaufgabe ist seine Erweiterung und der Ausbau seiner Macht an Orten, die andere Untertanen nicht erreichen können. Ihr erkundet die Grenzen nicht. Ihr seid die Grenze."
languages.original_text: "You are the quintessence of the will of the Imperium. Your purpose in life is to expand it and strengthen its power where other subjects cannot reach. You do not explore the frontier. You are the frontier."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid die Quintessenz des Willens des Imperiums. Eure Lebensaufgabe ist seine Erweiterung und der Ausbau seiner Macht an Orten, die andere Untertanen nicht erreichen können. Ihr erkundet die Grenzen nicht. Ihr seid die Grenze."

languages.text: 「あなたはインペリウムの意志の真髄です。あなたの人生の目的は、他の臣民の及ばないところで、インペリウムを拡大し、その力を強化することです。フロンティアを探検するのではない。君こそがフロンティアなのだ。」
languages.original_text: "You are the quintessence of the will of the Imperium. Your purpose in life is to expand it and strengthen its power where other subjects cannot reach. You do not explore the frontier. You are the frontier."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたはインペリウムの意志の真髄です。あなたの人生の目的は、他の臣民の及ばないところで、インペリウムを拡大し、その力を強化することです。フロンティアを探検するのではない。君こそがフロンティアなのだ。」

languages.text: "Siz, İmparatorluk'un iradesinin mükemmel bir örneğisiniz. Hayattaki amacınız, sıradan tebaanın ulaşamayacağı yerlerde İmparatorluk'u genişletmek ve gücünü artırmaktır. Siz hudutları keşfetmiyorsunuz. Hududun ta kendisisiniz."
languages.original_text: "You are the quintessence of the will of the Imperium. Your purpose in life is to expand it and strengthen its power where other subjects cannot reach. You do not explore the frontier. You are the frontier."

traits.locale_text: "Siz, İmparatorluk'un iradesinin mükemmel bir örneğisiniz. Hayattaki amacınız, sıradan tebaanın ulaşamayacağı yerlerde İmparatorluk'u genişletmek ve gücünü artırmaktır. Siz hudutları keşfetmiyorsunuz. Hududun ta kendisisiniz."
